title: Connector Config
description: Configuration file for overriding connector dependency versions in WSO2 MI projects.

version.description: Schema version of this config file.

omitAllDrivers.description: When true, driver JARs for all connectors are excluded from the CAR file.

omitAllConnectors.description: When true, all connector ZIPs are excluded from the CAR file.

connectors.description: Map of connector Maven artifactId (e.g. "mi-connector-file") to its dependency overrides.

additionalProperties.description: Override configuration for a single connector.

omit.description: When true, this connector's ZIP is excluded from the CAR file.

omitAllDrivers.description: When true, all driver JARs for this connector are excluded from the CAR file.

qname.description: The connector QName in {package}name form (e.g. "{org.wso2.connector}db"). Written automatically by the language server; do not edit manually.

dependencies.description: List of dependency overrides for this connector.

items.description: A single dependency override. Matched by connectionType first, then by groupId+artifactId.

connectionType.description: The connection type key from descriptor.yml (e.g. "MYSQL", "SFTP"). Used to identify which dependency to override.

groupId.description: Override the Maven groupId. Only effective when the override also changes the artifactId.

artifactId.description: Override the Maven artifactId. Use together with groupId to substitute a different library.

omit.description: When true, this dependency is excluded from the CAR file entirely.

localPath.description: Absolute path to a local JAR file. When set, Maven resolution is skipped and this JAR is used directly.
